name: Reexamining zero-shot summarization: Empirical investigation of trustworthiness of LLM-summarizers
summary: arXiv:2607.21010v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Zero-shot summarization using Large Language Models (LLMs) has significantly advanced the abstractive summarization task by producing coherent and fl...
description: arXiv:2607.21010v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Zero-shot summarization using Large Language Models (LLMs) has significantly advanced the abstractive summarization task by producing coherent and fluent summaries. However, underlying stochasticity of the large language models raises concerns about the stability and trustworthiness of the LLM-generated summaries. This issue has become increasingl...
author: Vasudha Bhatnagar, Purnima Bindal, Vikas Kumar, Raj Kumari Bahl
